```{r surgery rate table}
#| label: tab-surgery-rates
#| tbl-cap: "Surgical procedures"
#| tbl-cap-location: bottom
group_texts <- tibble::tibble(
  group = c("overall","abdominal_surgery","neurosurgery","inguinal_hernia_surgery",
          "cardiac_and_large_vessel_surgery",
          "lung_pleural_space_thoracic_surgery","other"),
  text = c("Overall","Abdominal surgery","Neurosurgery","Inguinal hernia surgery",
            "Cardiac- / large vessel surgery",
            "Lung- / pleural space- / thoracic surgery","Other")
)

output <- table_surgery_rates |>
  dplyr::rename(
    "No of procedures"="n_procedures",
    "Pooled mean"="procedure_rate",
    "Q₁"="q1",
    "Q₂"="q2",
    "Q₃"="q3") |>
  dplyr::left_join(group_texts, dplyr::join_by(group)) |>
  dplyr::mutate(group = text, .keep = "unused") |>
  gt(rowname_col = "group") |>
  fmt_number(decimals = 1) |>
  fmt_number(columns = "No of procedures", decimals = 0) |>
  cols_width(group ~ pct(35)) |>
  tab_row_group(
    label = "By category",
    rows = group != "Overall",
    id = "grp_cat") |>
#  row_group_order(groups = c(NA, "grp_cat")) |>
  tab_options(footnotes.font.size = pct(60)) |>
  tab_spanner(
    label = "Procedure rate",
    columns = c("Pooled mean","Q₁","Q₂","Q₃"),
    id = "procedure_rate"
  ) |>
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = md(
      paste0(
        "$$\\text{",
        "Procedure rate",
        "} = \\frac{\\text{",
        "Procedures",
        "}}{\\text{",
        "Patients",
        "}} \\times ",
        format(100, big.mark = locale_sep_mark),
        "$$"
      )),
    locations = cells_column_spanners(spanners = "procedure_rate")
  ) |>
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = "No of procedures: The aggregated number surgical procedures performed in all infants.",
    locations = cells_column_labels(columns = "No of procedures")) |>
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = "Pooled mean: The procedure rate calculated as procedures per 100 patients calculated across all infants.",
    locations = cells_column_labels(columns = "Pooled mean")) |>
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = "Q₁, Q₂, Q₃: The quartiles (25%, 50% and 75% quantiles) of the procedure rates of the partner departments",
    locations = cells_column_labels(columns = c("Q₁","Q₂","Q₃")))

for (i in 1:nrow(group_texts)) {
  grp <- group_texts[i,]
  if(grp$group == "overall")
    next

    output <- output |>
      tab_footnote(
        footnote = surgeries |>
          dplyr::filter(group == grp$group) |>
          dplyr::select(main_procedure_code) |>
          dplyr::distinct() |>
          dplyr::inner_join(ichi_health_interventions, join_by(main_procedure_code == code)) |>
          dplyr::arrange(main_procedure_code) |>
          dplyr::mutate(x = paste0("[",.data$intervention,"](",.data$url,")"), .keep = "none") |>
          dplyr::pull(x) |>
          paste0(collapse = ", ") |>
          gt::md(),
        locations = gt::cells_stub(rows = grp$text))
}

output
```
